title: 3AM Night Reset Prayer
hook: If anxiety wakes you at 3AM, pray this with me.
script: Right now, slow your breath. Inhale, Abba. Exhale, I belong to You. Again—Abba, I belong to You. Scan your body from head to toe. Wherever you feel tight, whisper, I cast this on You, Jesus, because You care for me. Now declare God’s promise: In peace I will lie down and sleep, for You alone make me dwell in safety. I rest under the shadow of the Almighty. Father, quiet my racing thoughts. Guard my room and my heart. Trade my fear for Your presence. I surrender this night to You. Amen. Save this for the next time 3AM comes.

title: Breathe, Pray, Sleep: 60 Seconds
hook: If you’re wide awake at 3AM, this is for you.
script: Your mind isn’t broken; it’s on high alert. Let’s gently switch it off with breath and prayer. Place a hand over your heart and breathe slowly: in for four, Abba; out for six, I belong to You. Tell your nervous system you’re safe. Now, picture your worries as stones. One by one say, Jesus, I give You this, because You care for me. Finally, whisper, In peace I will lie down and sleep. You are my refuge and fortress. Lord, keep watch while I sleep. I rest in Your wings. Save this and replay anytime the night feels loud.

title: Under His Wings at 3AM
hook: If the night feels heavy at 3AM, whisper this with me.
script: Breathe in, Abba. Breathe out, I belong to You. Again, Abba... I belong to You. Now, name what’s loud: this worry about tomorrow, this fear in my chest, this knot in my stomach. After each one, say, I cast it on You, because You care for me. Speak this truth: In peace I will lie down and sleep. Lord, You alone make me dwell in safety. Hide me under Your wings; be my refuge and fortress. Guard my mind; calm my body. I trust You with this night. Amen. Save this prayer and come back whenever 3AM arrives.
